description_long: This rifle features a camouflage-patterned fixed stock and forearm, with a matte dark metal receiver and barrel assembly. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly curved and positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is of standard length and capped with a simple cylindrical muzzle device. The upper receiver has a rail system, likely for mounting optics, but no sighting system is currently attached. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A camouflage-patterned rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and standard barrel, featuring a matte metal finish and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the camouflage stock, detachable box magazine, and full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the slim profile of the receiver and barrel.
